name: Mohidul Hoque Arif
tagline: I build robust backends, APIs, and the cloud infrastructure that scales them.
summary: I'm a Senior Software Engineer at SDS Manager with 6+ years building backend services, APIs, and business-analytical tools. I work full-stack — Python (Django, FastAPI), Go, and TypeScript/React — with a focus on cloud-native infrastructure on AWS using Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform. Outside work, I travel and listen to podcasts on tech, entrepreneurship, and self-improvement.
